miner.paper_title: Synthesis, characterization and optical properties of graphene oxide–polystyrene nanocomposites
miner.notes: The study focuses on the synthesis and characterization of GO-PS nanocomposites using seeded emulsion polymerization. The particle size decreases with increasing GO content, and the dried films exhibit structural color due to self-assembly. The thermal stability of the nanocomposites is improved compared to pure PS.
